items.blurb: Why Timberwolves need another star besides Anthony Edwards — The Minnesota Timberwolves are fresh off a 126-97 beatdown by the second-seeded San Antonio Spurs in the Western Conference semifinals. items.blurb: Keegan Murray Underwent Left Ankle Surgery — Sacramento Kings forward Keegan Murray underwent left ankle surgery on Tuesday. The procedure was to remove loose bodies in Murray's ankle.
